scope: visual direction for strategic layer plus future local scenes
desktop and mobile UX implications for map-to-local transitions
questions: How can the strategic map and future local scenes share one original retro Sango visual language?
What should the first city scene abstractly look like without drifting into cinematic realism?
How should NPC memory, relationship, intent, and uncertainty appear without crowding the current strategy UI?
Which current Phase 1 UI patterns should stay visually stable while exploring AI-driven local scenes?
acceptance: Review is comments-only and does not modify public/assets, src, tests, package files, or current Phase 1 acceptance.
Review identifies visual and UX risks before any asset request is created.
Review recommends whether to accept, revise, or reject the visual direction in RFC-0001.
